title: stachys darcyana
intro: Stachys darcyana, also known as Darcy's betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate pain. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. Stachys darcyana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
